title: OptiFine for NeoForge
body:
--- [![Also try OFF](https://mr.millered001.workers.dev/data/cached_images/cbca749f42175e81b087f52ca7f9c6096c5a8078.png)](https://mr.millered001.workers.dev/modpack/optifine-for-quilt) [![Also try OFQ](https://mr.millered001.workers.dev/data/cached_images/bc885867df43a3b3db4253988eb3bec6aa4a0323.png)](https://mr.millered001.workers.dev/modpack/optifine-for-quilt) # #UpdateSinytraConnector ### **[Sinytra Connector](https://mr.millered001.workers.dev/mod/connector) is the only mod holding this modpack back. It has been stuck on 1.21.1 for over a year now, and it doesn't seem like it's coming back. If _anyone_ can port it, PLEASE do. I had high hopes for this modpack, and I can't do anything until [Sinytra Connector](https://mr.millered001.workers.dev/mod/connector) updates.** # ## Looking for a modpack that has all the features OptiFine does? You're in the right place! ### ⚡ Insane Performance Boost - 🧠 **Lightweight optimization** for smoother gameplay - 🖥️ Runs great even on **low-end systems** - ⚡ **8x FPS** compared to Vanilla - 💻 No stuttering frames - 📶 Less lag ### 🎨 Graphics Enhancements - 🌈 **HD textures** and resource pack support - 🔍 Built-in **zoom functionality** (just like OptiFine - but with more customibility!) - 🧊 **Connected textures** for seamless visuals - 🧥 Support for **capes** and custom models - 🔦 Dynamic lighting and shader compatibility - 🧪 Includes **block & entity model enhancements** - 🧵 Smooth animations and visual polish ### ✅ Better Than OptiFine - 🧩 NeoForge compatibility - 🧠 More **reliable** and modular - 🧪 Actively maintained and updated for **latest Minecraft versions** ### 🛠️ Modding Flexibility - 🔧 Compatible with **additional mods** for custom setups - 🧭 Working on **Lunar Client compatibility** ## ### FPS Comparison Chart ![FPS Benchmark](https://mr.millered001.workers.dev/data/cached_images/b4f3b656bb24e6f85ac8344e64d14c03343c1565.png) ##
Version info **Example version: 19.4+2.1a** - The first set of numbers **(19.4)** are for the Minecraft version **1.19.4** - The 4th number **(2)** is the major version of **OptiFine for NeoForge** - The 5th number **(1)** is the minor version of **OptiFine for NeoForge** - The letter **(a)** is the release channel of the pack **Major version info:** The latest major version (and the one I recommend playing on) is **v3.** **Minor version info:** Minor versions only update when a mod is updated or a bug has been fixed, so just play on the latest minor version for your Minecraft version. **Release channel info:** - **A:** Stands for Alpha, which is the most unstable channel. It will most likely have bugs or major missing features. - **B:** Stands for Beta, which is a testing channel. It may have bugs or minor missing features. - **No letter:** Stable. This is the channel that I recommend playing on, as it has been tested and has all of the features. The only time you should use **Alpha** or **Beta** builds is when you need to play on that version, and even then, please report any and all bugs you find.
**Report bugs at the official [bug tracker!](https://github.com/iModder/OptiFine-for-Fabric/issues)**
